title: CompetencyResource
description: A Resource node — the underpinning of a competency: a technology, tool, framework, method or standard. Connected to competencies via the 'backed_by' relation. Answers what a competency relies on.

id.description: Resource identifier. Grammar: 'resource:' prefix + dot-separated slug levels, each matching [a-z0-9-] (e.g. 'resource:langchain').

description.description: Optional longer description of the resource

url.description: Optional link to documentation, homepage, or specification
